episodes.title: S2 E5: The 2008 Outpouring
episodes.description:
Welcome back to 2008, where speaking in tongues is IN and the pourings are OUT! In part two of our ’08 trauma dump, we’re zooming in on the doctrinal distractions that were shoved in front of the congregation to keep people from asking too many questions about the latest Uncle Icky affair. How the hell did an evangelical revival in Florida being led by a dude we’ve never head of become Gary’s favorite topic??? Listen in to find out, and stay tuned as we unpack:

Shadrach, Meschach and Abednego??????????Finally getting a taste of what our cult felt like “when John was alive”The abrupt change in marching orders from “keep it in the family” to “shout it from the rooftops”Evangelizing with ZERO experience at the Northridge MallThe existential burden of being asked to participate in “Divine Healing”
CONTENT & TRIGGER WARNINGS: Religious and Spiritual Ab*se, Emotional Ab*se, High Control Environments/Relationships, Narcissistic Ab*se and Manipulation, $*xually Inappropriate Behavior and Gr00ming by Authority Figures, TODD BENTLY AGAIN, BLUEBERRIES APPARENTLY, Evangelical Revival Language and Mindset, as aforementioned: Shadrach, Meschach and Abednego!!!

episodes.title: S2 E4: The 2008 Microtyrants
episodes.description:
Welcome to the best worst year of our lives: 2008! In part one of this 2008 extravaganza, we’re taking a look at the repeat scandal that set off a chain of organizational and spiritual chaos, and some of the prominent figures that rose to power the INSTANT there was a power vacuum. Follow along as we wade through our big feelings about:

The 2008 Scandal and immediate subsequent siege--wait, no, “OUTPOURING”Uncle Icky out of the picture for the first time in our livesThe Microtyrants who rose to prominence during this timeThe whiplash of shifting from decades of insular doctrine to TODD BENTLY???

episodes.title: Ep 12: The Nick of Time with Nick Hays
episodes.description:
It’s our Season One FINALE, folks! Our guest this week is a guy we found in a bar that one time: Nick Hays. As the Living Word Fellowship was falling apart, Nick had a backstage pass to all the red flags as he and  Leandra started to date, and also, Stasia was there!!! Now he’s here to share his unique perspective as an outsider with inside information on the collapse of a cult. Join us as Nick takes us through the timeline and recollects:

• Meeting two babes at the best bar in Burbank
• Being reassured our church was “Not that kind of church”
• Finding out it is!
• Finding out it’s MUCH much worse!
• 2018 and beyond!

Don’t fret! We’ll be back this winter with a CHRISTMAS TRUCK Special (*ominous jingle bells*) and we’ll be super duper back in Spring 2026 with a whole new season! 


CONTENT TRIGGER WARNINGS: Religious Ab*se, High Control Environments, Grooming by Authority Figures, Mental Health Struggles, Substance Ab*use: Alcohol,  🚨POPE HAT🚨

episodes.title: Ep 11: The Motherlode - Part 2 With Sandra Alex
episodes.description:
She’s BACK, ladies and gentlefriends, and she’s here to tell you some more wild shit in a really calm tone. This week is part deux of our interview with Sandra Alex, and we’re picking up exactly where we left off: with Sandra headed from Rio to Iowa. She’s a metaphorical mother to all, and literal mother to Leandra, specifically. Join us once again as we hold our collective breaths and listen to Sandra remember: 

* Trying to be part of the “IN” crowd in Los Angeles 
* Getting electrocuted at 18 because of a pastor’s negligence 
* Her own understanding of the “Vision of the Kingdom” 
* A “Prophecy” to John Robert Stevens from a KKK-affiliated “ministry” 
* Navigating her faith after 2018 Cult Implosion


CONTENT TRIGGER WARNINGS: Religious, $*xual, and Spiritual Ab*se, High Control Environments/Relationships, Grooming by Authority Figures, Substance Ab*use, 🚨JEZEBEL🚨, 🚨🚨GLEANINGS🚨🚨

episodes.title: Ep 10: The Motherlode - Part 1 With Sandra Alex
episodes.description:
HTD - The Motherlode!  

This is IT, Disappointments! The first installment of this mother loving episode is here! Our guest this week is Leandra’s ACTUAL mother, Sandra Alex! We had to break this one up into chunks because it is literal gold. It is: the MOTHERLODE! Join us as our jaws hit the floor over and over and over, while Sandra shares mind-blowing memories like: 

• Getting DOUBLE GROUNDED by her mom in front of Jack Bruce from Cream (and some famous Brazilian musicians) 
• Getting UNgrounded by attending a Cult Youth Group meeting 
• Learning English to read cult literature 
• Getting called a Nephilim to her face by Marilyn 
• Helping to fund the first cult property in Brazil (Mount Zion The First) and what horrors subsequently occurred there 


CONTENT TRIGGER WARNINGS: Religious, $*xual, and Spiritual Ab*se, High Control Environments/Relationships, Grooming by Authority Figures, Depression,🚨🚨ARBA 🚨🚨

Join us as we discuss:
• Dads!

• Keeping the faith

As always, thank you and we treasure your attention!

episodes.title: Ep 7: The Shiloh Show (Part 2)
episodes.description:
THE SUMMER CHAOS CONTINUES! After having a full blown technical melt down for a few weeks in a row, we are proud to bring you a re-RE-recorded Part Deux of our Shiloh summer camp romp. We pick up where we left you last: disoriented, mid-way through camp, and gearing up for another big event. Buckle up as we immerse you in memories of: 

* The Canadian National Anthem

episodes.title: Ep 6: The Shiloh Show (Part 1)
episodes.description:
BRACE YOURSELVES, DISAPPOINTMENTS! This week we take you on PART 1 of a journey we’ve embarked on TOO many times… from wherever you are in the world, to a place we ne’r need return: SHILOH SUMMER CAMP! *womp WOMP!* As is tradition, our Shiloh Summer Camp plans got derailed and delayed, just like our flights to Cedar Rapids. You’ll have to bear with us through some technical difficulties, and let us trigger your memories and/or paint you a picture of: 

* THE SHILOH COMPOUND!!
* Corn!
* Grueling & constant manual labor!
* Getting in trouble for things you DIDN’T EVEN DO!
* A great big show 
* MORE CORN!

If you ever experienced Shiloh, you’re used to waiting unbearable amounts of time between things you care about, and on that note, come back in two weeks for Part 2. 

CONTENT TRIGGER WARNINGS:  Religious and Spiritual Ab*se, High Control Environments/Relationships, Forced Manual Labor, $*xually Inappropriate Behavior, Grooming by Authority Figures, Amphitheaters, Cornhole,🚨THE HIGHEST SHELF🚨

episodes.title: Ep 4: The Roast of Uncle Icky 360
episodes.description:
Ok, Disappointments, hold on to your butts. It’s the Roast of Uncle Icky 360. This week we’re diving into Leandra’s “360 Review” of Uncle Icky as a boss and pastor from back in October of 2018. From inscrutable expectations to labor exploitation, this review gives a peek into Leandra’s experience as an indentured—*COUGH cough* sorry, as an EMPLOYEE of the Living Word cult. FOR COMEDY PURPOSES! And also for healing purposes lol. Join us as we un-gaslight ourselves and unpack past-Leandra’s perspective on:

Uncle Icky’s Management Style (f****n’ L O L)The cost of dissent within the cultConversational manipulation tacticsCLASSIC cult information control structureHow Uncle Icky treated women (and how uncomfortable that was)
CONTENT TRIGGER WARNINGS:  Religious and Spiritual Ab*se, Labor Exploitation, Physical and Emotional Ab*se, High Control Environments/Relationships, Narcissistic Ab*se and Manipulation, $*xually Inappropriate Behavior and Grooming by Authority Figures, Childhood $*xual Ab*se, THE LITERAL ACTUAL STRUCTURE OF A CULT read from the perspective of someone who had no idea what a cult was, BARN. I repeat, BARN.

episodes.description:

Former TLW member and “blow out,” he is also the guest of our sisterbrothermother podcast, Snapping Out Of It! Enjoy the madness as we get into topics like:

episodes.title: Ep 1: The Disappointment Begins
episodes.description:
In our very exciting first episode, we'll be giving you, dear listener, some context on who we are, what the heck this show is, and why we can't stop crying at the grocery store! (It’s the trauma.) Tune in to hear us ramble on about all of this and more as we discuss:
The cult from whence we cameLeaving a harmful environment and the messy feelings that followThe power of sharing stories, even the painful onesThe all-too-relatable story of getting groped in the Pope Room at Bucca Di Beppo   (You know the one)
